artifactRefs.description: Focused command receipts and review evidence for G010 navigation, packages index, docs/spec, and test surfaces.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G010 objective and docs/planning/06-tasks.md:P1-S0 navigation contract
contractCoverage.obligation: Production sidebar and compliance entry points route Content Factory through /packages and do not expose /packages/demo.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G010 production Content Factory index route
contractCoverage.obligation: /packages is a real persisted-data-backed index that lists packages from listContentPackages(null) and links to /packages/:id.
Settings is removed from production sidebar/compliance body routes and remains available via the header settings action contract.
Docs/specs align with implemented dark CSS tokens and stale light palette assumptions are removed.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm test -- tests/ux-navigation-contract.test.ts tests/hq-screen-contract.test.ts tests/p3-contract.test.ts plus focused Biome/typecheck
Static contract test and TypeScript check over app/(app)/packages/page.tsx

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Design docs and screen route specs
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Static contract test over docs/planning/05-design-system.md docs/planning/06-tasks.md specs/screens/index.yaml and app/globals.css

adversarialCases.scenario: A production sidebar, compliance action, or packages index links to /packages/demo.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: /packages/demo is absent from production entry surfaces and remains documented only as development-only.

adversarialCases.scenario: Settings reappears in sidebar or Compliance body actions.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: DepartmentNav and Compliance page omit /settings while tests preserve header settings access.

adversarialCases.scenario: A sibling path like /packages-demo incorrectly activates Content Factory.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Prefix matching requires exact href or href followed by '/', so sibling prefixes do not activate.

adversarialCases.scenario: A package with null/non-finite progress is displayed as measured 0%.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The UI renders 진행 미측정 and omits a fake 0% progress meter for unknown progress.

adversarialCases.scenario: Docs drift back to stale light palette or omit implemented dark tokens.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Design docs contain color-scheme: dark and implemented dark CSS tokens, and tests reject stale light palette literals.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORTS reran cleanly after fixes: docs cleanup agent://68-G010CleanupDocs had no blocking findings and its advisories were addressed; code cleanup rerun agent://71-G010CleanupCodeRerun returned CLEAR/APPROVE with no blocking findings; final architect agent://72-G010ArchitectReviewRerun and executor QA agent://73-G010ExecutorQaRerun are clean with empty blockers.
